base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of rex_blargg_dinorhino — a character (mount_or_vehicle) from 1990 super mario world. Rex (2-hit lizard), Blargg (lava beast), Dino-Rhino (Koopa-platform mount). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Rex (2-hit lizard), Blargg (lava beast), Dino-Rhino (Koopa-platform mount)
